texto: Yes, people do come across the street to say hi, but as they approach and get near, my perception of space begins to dissolve, and a new interest takes over that is primarily emotional, and with it comes a desire to touch, which may be a human interest, but not the interest of my work.
explicacao: Citação de Diego Giacometti sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Yes, people do come across the street to say hi, but as they approach and get near, my perception…” articula trabalho, work, perception em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e perception.
